name: DeFi Llama MCP Server (Kryptoskatt)
what_it_does: MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the DeFi Llama API — the leading DeFi data aggregator tracking Total Value Locked (TVL), yields, protocol metrics, and blockchain financial data across all major DeFi protocols and chains.
use_cases: Querying DeFi protocol TVL and metrics for crypto research agents
Retrieving yield farming opportunities across protocols for DeFi analytics agents
Tracking protocol performance and rankings from blockchain intelligence agents
Building DeFi market intelligence workflows with comprehensive protocol data
not_for: Real-time trading execution (data/analytics focus, not trading)
best_when: A DeFi researcher, analyst, or protocol team wants AI agents to query DeFi Llama's comprehensive protocol data — tracking TVL trends, comparing yields, and monitoring the health of DeFi ecosystems.
avoid_when: You want CeFi exchange data. DeFi Llama is specifically for on-chain DeFi protocol analytics. Also: DeFi data is inherently volatile — decisions based on it carry significant financial risk.

auth.notes: DeFi Llama API is largely public with no auth required for basic endpoints. MCP server may require Kryptoskatt credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: DeFi Llama API is free and public
pricing.notes: DeFi Llama API is free and open. MCP server wrapper pricing from Kryptoskatt unknown. High-volume use may require DeFi Llama Pro.

performance.rate_limits: DeFi Llama API: no strict limits but abuse protection

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: DeFi data drives investment decisions — always add disclaimers on agent outputs
DeFi TVL and yield data changes rapidly — cached data may be stale within hours
Protocol data may include exit-scammed or rug-pulled protocols — filter accordingly
Yield data is gross yield — net yield after fees/impermanent loss is significantly different
Kryptoskatt wrapper may have separate rate limits from DeFi Llama API directly
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: DeFi analytics data. Investment decisions based on protocol data carry high risk. Data accuracy varies — DeFi Llama uses on-chain data but some protocol data is estimated.

security_score_components.security_notes: DeFi data drives financial decisions. High financial risk from protocol failures. Generally public data. Kryptoskatt intermediary trust required.
